% ──────────────────────────────────────────
% Senary — monthly calendar (front) + habit tracker (back), landscape
% m5 (105×67)
% Content is generated by senary.py into <edition>/content.tex.
% Build: uv run python senary.py 2026-07
%        cd senary-2026-07 && xelatex senary-2026-07.tex && xelatex
% senary-2026-07.tex
% (run from the edition dir; sizes.tex is at the repo root)
% ──────────────────────────────────────────
\documentclass[10pt, twoside]{article}

% ── Size (landscape m5) ──
\input{../sizes.tex}

% ── Page geometry ──
\usepackage[paperwidth=\Size{m5l}{PW} mm,
  paperheight=\Size{m5l}{PH} mm,
  margin=0mm,
twoside]{geometry}

% ── Packages ──
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{3270 Nerd Font Mono}

% ── Grid line style ──
\definecolor{gridred}{HTML}{b0001a}
\tikzset{gridline/.style={gridred!55, line width=0.5pt}}

% ── Page style ──
\pagestyle{empty}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}
\setlength{\topskip}{0pt}

% ──────────────────────────────────────────
\begin{document}
\input{content.tex}
\end{document}
